\section{Results}

Our run yields a fidelity of \resultref{run_1.fidelity} with energy
conservation reaching \resultref{run_1.dynamics.energy_conservation}\,\%.
A second run improves this to \resultref{run_2.fidelity} (std
\resultref{run_2.details.std}).

\section{Comparison with Prior Work}

The previously reported fidelity by Rydberg et al.\ is
\litref{rydberg2024.fidelity} \cite{rydberg2024}, while Smith et al.\ measured
a gate time of \litref{smith2023.gate_time_ns}\,ns \cite{smith2023}.
